ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( (ISBLANK(Accession_Number__c)), (ISBLANK( Appointment__c )), (ISBLANK( Appointment_Date__c )), (ISBLANK( Appointment_Time__c )), (ISBLANK( Calendar_Code__c )), (ISBLANK( Domain_Code__c )), (ISBLANK( Patient_Name__c )), (ISBLANK( Payer_Factor__c )), (ISBLANK( Procedure_Code__c )), (ISBLANK( Reminder_Time__c )), (ISBLANK( Site_Code__c )), (ISBLANK( Reminder_Date__c )), And( (ISBLANK( Phone__c )), (ISBLANK( Other_Phone__c )) ) )
